# Ishaq Hassan

> Flutter Framework Contributor, Engineering Manager, Open Source Author, Public Tech Speaker

Ishaq Hassan is a Full Stack Developer and Engineering Manager at DigitalHire with 13+ years of professional software development experience, based in Karachi, Pakistan. He has 3 Pull Requests merged into the official flutter/flutter repository and 2 more approved.

## Key Facts
- 3 PRs merged into flutter/flutter (official Flutter framework)
- Engineering Manager at DigitalHire (AI-based video job board)
- Instructor of 35-video Flutter course in Urdu, listed on official Flutter documentation
- 10+ public speaking events (GDG DevFest, Google I/O Extended, universities)
- GDG Kolachi Mentor and community leader
- 9,800+ GitHub contributions, 64 stars, 135+ forks
- Open source author: document_scanner_flutter, flutter_alarm_background_trigger, assets_indexer
- 6 technical articles on Medium (Dart Isolates, Flutter Architecture, Plugin Development)

## Links
- Website: https://ishaqhassan.dev
- GitHub: https://github.com/ishaquehassan
- LinkedIn: https://linkedin.com/in/ishaquehassan
